channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Furniture and washing machine, 27th March
item.description:
Fly tipping at the corner of chequer street and Cahill street Ec1y postcode

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Errol Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped black bag and litter, 27th March
item.description:
Black bag dumped in bushes near southern exit from park, quite a bit of litter around it too

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped timber, 27th March
item.description:
Usual fly tipping blight..right opposite the new sign aiming to discourage!

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress +tv dumped, 27th March
item.description:
A mattress and tv cabinet dumped in Barry Avenue allotment DA7 5JS on plot 4 . Reported to allotment section they advised unable to do anything . Rubbish attracts more if not cleared

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bostall Park Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac breaking up, 27th March
item.description:
I have reported this a few times before but the tarmac is breaking up considerably now and it would be good if this could be resolved.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coxwell Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in entrance to Longlands Rec., 27th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Longlands Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 27th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Fly Tipping, 27th March
item.description:
Various items dumped outside 20 Fassett Square
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fassett Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Complaint, 27th March
item.description:
I have raised a complaint about these two street lights! Not once has anyone attempted to reply! Someone keeps marking these as fixed- SIX TIMES!!!! They have never worked after each attendance if even ever attended!!! I have raised a freedom of informations request requesting who has been marking these as fixed, what works have supposed to be done, where they test, where has my complaint gone etc! These have not worked since January!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter down Combermere Rd, 27th March
item.description:
Litter down Combermere Rd. Ongoing isssue. Daily littering as 2 schools off street with parents:pupils littering and uber drivers who use street to park and dump rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bag of soil, 27th March
item.description:
Dumped bag of soil

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover, 27th March
item.description:
It is making a noise when a vehicle going over it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Road, Oval, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 27th March

item.title: Daily littering from local restaurants outside my house, 27th March
item.description:
Rubbish left daily and piling up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rossendale Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins, 27th March
item.description:
2 bins in Chequers Close, one left at entrance and one left on green. Please can they be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chequers Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal flyposting again, 27th March
item.description:
They’ve put up another poster at the start of Taunton close that’s been there for about a week, they’re now working on a house on this street and also park coving all the pavement forcing pedestrians into the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Taunton Close, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose paving slabs between Old Vic and Wellington Street, 27th March
item.description:
There are a number of loose and cracked pavings slabs on the pavement on Waterloo Road between Old Vic theatre and Wellington House. There are 10+ trip hazards, I walk down this path every day and see people tripping. They also fill with rain water and unpleasantly splash if you step on them
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133-155, Waterloo Road, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full litter bins, 27th March
item.description:
At the bus stops near to the junction of Copers Cope Road and The Avenue on Southend Road and just after a few days since my last report all three litterbins are full and will soon be overflowing again.These bins need to be emptied on a more regular basis as once a week is clearly NOT enough
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Washing machine + suitcase, 27th March
item.description:
A washing machine with a suitcase on top of it has been left outside block 17-22 Duddington Close SE9 4JD

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duddington Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
